pageContext.name: Alphen
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Kotobukiya present the Alphen Statue.  Alphen from Tales of Arise is coming to life as a 1:8 scale figure.  His distinct expression shows his strength as he fixes his sharp gaze ahead. Brandishing his blazing sword, Alphen comes to life in a heroic pose right as the battle is about to begin.  His large, complex armor has been faithfully recreated down to the smallest detail. The realistic paintwork, including the metallic-looking texture and tiny scratches, combine to create a truly authentic finish.  Alphen's blazing sword has been made with clear parts. His right arm, burning along with his sword, has also been recreated with excellent painting techniques.  In addition to the dynamic sculpting of his large cape blowing in the wind, fine details such as small rips and a painted gradation have been beautifully added to this figure.  The combination of the powerful sculpt and detailed finish is sure to be the highlight of this masterpiece.  Add him to your collection today!  Display him together with the upcoming Rinwell and Dohalim to recreate the world of Tales of Arise.
